goal: Aura Node + Thaumometer parity pass from TC4 intent to MC 1.19.2 architecture
fixed_now: AuraNodeBlockEntity now has typed node type, stability, scanned flag, visualSize and richer save/load NBT.
AuraNodeBlock supports thaumometer/goggles right-click scan behavior and emits server particles.
AuraNodeRenderer uses typed color, scanned boost and stability pulse.
ThaumometerItem bridge added if it did not already exist.
Node type sprites generated from original nodes.png sprite for NORMAL/PURE/DARK/UNSTABLE/TAINTED/HUNGRY visual bridge.
why_this_is_closer_to_original: In TC4 the node is a magical phenomenon with data and scan behavior, not a normal full cube.
This pass strengthens node data and thaumometer interaction instead of only changing the block model.
The renderer remains translucent/special while the block remains invisible/technical.
still_needed: Exact TC4 node renderer math and blending.
Thaumometer scan persistence/unlock integration with research.
Client sync for node aspects/stability beyond block update.
